conversation_templates.title: Welcome + Role Segmentation
conversation_templates.goal: Greet user, segment role, route to best next step

steps.text:
Hi, I’m Jana 👋
I can help you understand GITProNet, certifications, PeopleAIHub, People AI Platform, JanMitra Cooperative, and the People-First AI Summit.

What would you like to explore?

steps.prompt: Before we begin—who are you mainly?

conversation_templates.title: 60-Second Ecosystem Overview
conversation_templates.goal: Explain full ecosystem simply and offer next action

steps.text:
Here’s the People-First AI ecosystem in 60 seconds:

1) **GITProNet** organizes professionals (IT + Support + Management)
2) **Certifications** prepare members for AI-enabled work
3) **PeopleAIHub** enables collaboration and co-building
4) **People AI Platform** powers assistants + workflows
5) **JanMitra Cooperative** delivers trusted services locally using Jana AI
6) The **People-First AI Summit** showcases and scales the model

Which part should we go deeper into?

conversation_templates.title: Membership Join Flow
conversation_templates.goal: Move user from interest → clear steps → optional lead capture

steps.text:
Awesome. Joining GITProNet is the fastest way to get into the People-First AI ecosystem.

What are you joining for?

Here are the next steps:

1) Open the join page
2) Choose your role (Student / Developer / Support / Management)
3) Confirm your primary interest
4) You’ll receive onboarding instructions and next links

Want me to send you the exact link and next steps tailored to you?

Share:
1) Name
2) Email or mobile
3) City
4) Interest (Membership / Certification / PeopleAIHub / JanMitra / Summit)

conversation_templates.title: Certification Selector (3 Questions)
conversation_templates.goal: Help user choose CAIDP/CAIESP/CAIMP, then route to enrollment

steps.text:
I’ll help you choose the right certification in 3 quick questions.

1) Do you prefer **building tech**, **delivering services**, or **coordinating systems**?
2) How much time can you commit weekly?
3) What outcome matters most right now?
quick_replies: Lead and manage a sector ecosystem

then.message:
**Recommended track: CAIDP** — AI Developer Professional.
Want enrollment steps or PeopleAIHub onboarding?

**Recommended track: CAIESP** — AI-Enabled Support Professional.
Want enrollment steps or the JanMitra Associate path?

**Recommended track: CAIMP** — AI Management Professional.
Want an example project or enrollment steps?

default.message: If you tell me whether you prefer building tech, delivering services, or coordinating systems, I can recommend the best track.

conversation_templates.title: Support Professional → JanMitra Associate Path
conversation_templates.goal: Explain steps to become JanMitra Associate and route to certification/join

steps.text:
If you want to become a **JanMitra Associate**, here’s the path:

1) **Join GITProNet** (membership)
2) Enroll in **CAIESP** (support professional certification)
3) Complete guided practice (intake, documentation, workflows)
4) Join onboarding for the **JanMitra Cooperative**
5) Start delivering services with Jana AI guidance

What do you want next?

JanMitra Associates typically support:
• Citizen & resident services (forms, guidance, coordination)
• Healthcare access support (appointments, documentation, navigation)
• Education support (admissions, scholarships, coordination)
• Travel/mobility coordination
• Finance/insurance assistance (documentation + provider navigation)

Want to focus on one sector first?

conversation_templates.title: Developer → PeopleAIHub Onboarding
conversation_templates.goal: Explain PeopleAIHub for developers and route to CAIDP/join

steps.text:
As a developer, PeopleAIHub is where you build People-First AI projects with others.

You can start with:
• Agent templates + workflow patterns
• Sector assistant starter kits
• Documentation and integration guides
• Community review and mentorship

Do you want the quickest path to start building?

Quickest path:
1) Join GITProNet
2) Choose **Developer** role
3) Start with one starter project in PeopleAIHub
4) Enroll in **CAIDP** for structured learning + portfolio

Want the links?

conversation_templates.title: Management Professional → CAIMP Path
conversation_templates.goal: Explain management role in ecosystem and route to CAIMP/join

steps.text:
Management professionals are the ecosystem builders in People-First AI.

Your work typically includes:
• Provider networks and partnerships
• Sector data banks (services, steps, pricing)
• Operational models for districts/cities
• Governance and cooperative execution

The best starting point is **CAIMP**.
Want an example CAIMP project or enrollment steps?

Example CAIMP capstone:

**Build a district-level service network** for one sector (e.g., healthcare or education):
• List provider categories and onboarding criteria
• Define standardized service steps and documentation
• Create pricing and escalation rules
• Map the workflow into a Jana AI guided process

Want to pick a sector to see a more concrete example?

conversation_templates.title: Student → Track Selector
conversation_templates.goal: Help student choose learning path and next step

steps.text:
As a student, you can enter the ecosystem through one of these paths:

• **Developer path (CAIDP)** — if you want to build AI products
• **Support path (CAIESP)** — if you want to deliver services with AI
• **Management path (CAIMP)** — if you want to organize networks and operations

What sounds most like you?

then.message:
Start with **CAIDP** + PeopleAIHub.
Want the CAIDP overview or onboarding links?

Start with **CAIESP** and explore the JanMitra Associate path.
Want CAIESP overview or JanMitra explanation?

Start with **CAIMP** to build sector networks and operations.
Want CAIMP overview or an example project?

conversation_templates.title: Sponsor / Partner Flow
conversation_templates.goal: Guide sponsors/partners to clear options and capture interest

steps.text:
Thanks for your interest in partnering.

Which partnership route fits you best?

I can connect you to the right team and share the relevant brief.
Want to leave your details?

Please share:
1) Name
2) Organization
3) Email or mobile
4) City/Country
5) Partnership interest

conversation_templates.title: Summit Interest Registration
conversation_templates.goal: Collect summit interest and route to summit page

steps.text:
Sure. I can help you register interest for the People-First AI Summit.

Are you attending as:

Share:
1) Name
2) Email or mobile
3) City
4) Attendance type
steps.success_message:
Thanks. Please check summit details here: {{link.summit}}

Would you like agenda highlights or sponsorship options?

conversation_templates.title: FAQ Short Answers
conversation_templates.goal: Provide crisp FAQ answers and route user

steps.text:
Here are quick answers. Choose one:

• What do I get as a member?
• Which certification is right for me?
• What is PeopleAIHub?
• What is JanMitra Cooperative?
• How does People-First AI work?
